title: Beetroots To Strawberries
description: Changes beetroots and other beetroot related items to strawberry related ones.
body:
## Changes all beetroot related items to strawberry related ones.

Supports Eating Animation
https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation

Beetroots To Strawberries

Beetroot Seeds To Strawberry Seeds

Beetroot Soup To Strawberry Ice Cream
